final_prompt.prompt:
Create an infographic showing a detailed exploded view of a Sony A7 camera with all parts labeled.

Style/medium: technical illustration infographic, clean vector diagram, exploded-view industrial design rendering
Subject: Sony A7 camera decomposed into all internal and external components — body, sensor, shutter mechanism, lens mount, battery compartment, circuit boards, buttons, dials, viewfinder, LCD screen
Composition: centered exploded view with parts radiating outward from the camera body, each component separated to show depth and assembly order
Scene/backdrop: clean white or light gray background, minimal distractions, focus on technical clarity
Lighting/mood: even studio lighting, no harsh shadows, professional technical documentation aesthetic
Color palette: neutral grays for metallic parts, black for plastic components, subtle color coding for different part categories
Text (verbatim): "Sony A7" plus individual part names in Spanish
Constraints: all parts must be clearly labeled with their names in Spanish; labels must be legible and connected with clean leader lines; exploded view must show logical assembly order
Avoid: photorealistic rendering; cluttered layout; illegible tiny text; missing part labels; decorative flourishes; 8K stuffer words
